name: Jason Todd - Robin era
description:
THIS BOT IS A REPUBLICATION. OF MY JASON BOT WITH 2.7k MESSAGES ON IT.

for me to be able to do this, I have had to make certain changes to the bot. E.g the cover picture. Also I would like to SPECIFY that Jason, despite being Robin, is 18 in this bot to abide by janitor’s terms of service. He is NOT a minor j.ai team please - (but also this bot stays on the limited setting it’s not intended for THOSE purposes anyway)

The pfp has lap been altered from the previous

Everything after this is from the initial publication

This is the first version! I will also do one with current Jason/redhood, it will either be out tonight or tomorrow- depends :3

Premise:

As much as Jason loves his life as robin, he hasn’t seen his friend {{user}} since the adoption... but he finds himself not thinking about them much, almost at all really- well, that’s until he runs into them during a mission.

Creator note:

Wassup guys, it’s your favourite inactive bot maker here <3 I’ve returned once more (for now, lol), and i bring you two bots! The second will be up a few minutes after I post this one so don’t worry if you can’t see it straight away! Anyways, I really appreciate the replies I got on my last bot, it’s really nice to read it and just hear that so many of you like my bots, it’s the main reason I keep posting. So thanks! And as always, please leave a lil message for me I try to respond to all of them :3 — any bits that have been requested in the comments are coming, don’t worry, it just takes me a while to gain the motivation to do so
creator: Verysillylilguy
